nodes.name: Metadatapp
nodes.summary: Metadata hygiene assistant for lean analytics teams.

nodes.name: Mina Laurent
nodes.background: Former analytics engineering lead at a mid-market logistics firm.

nodes.name: Small data teams in regulated SMBs
nodes.size: Fictional wedge of 18,000 EU and US companies.

nodes.statement: Lean data teams will pay for automated spreadsheet and dashboard lineage checks.
Customers can connect core metadata sources in under one hour without IT support.

nodes.summary: Nine discovery interviews found recurring audit anxiety around orphan dashboards and undocumented spreadsheet exports.
Two fictional pilot teams found 37 stale assets in the first scan but needed help configuring warehouse credentials.

nodes.name: Onboarding friction delays time to value.
nodes.mitigation: Build guided connectors and read-only credential templates.

nodes.name: Teams may distrust automated metadata risk scores.
nodes.mitigation: Expose explainable scoring and source-level evidence.
